sources_exist.note: Six cited pages resolved (including the Equiteq redirect), but inputs.active_consolidators.url returned HTTP 403 and could not be audited as accessible content. All 7 canonical URL occurrences were checked.

figures_match_sources.note: The McKinsey owner-age figures and the GreenBook 98.2/34.0 revenue-health figures match, and the marketing-services page gives directional 7-8x public agency and 8.3x public market-research comps. However, the Perspective page supports 72% of buyers using GenAI in at least one stage, not the claimed 67% supplier-deliverable figure or the claimed AI-versus-human interview-volume milestone; Equiteq's landing page does not expose 11.9x; and neither the buy-multiple nor pricing citations support the recorded small-firm normalized multiple or billing shares.

judgment_inputs_plausible.note: Role fractions and pi_moat are bounded and directionally plausible, but t50_years=1.0 treats broad buyer use in at least one stage as 50% material firm adoption and relies on an unsupported 67% supplier figure. pi_dist=0.40 also relies on an unsupported 70% fixed-price billing mix. These inputs materially drive A and C.

rubric_consistent.note: The LOW_CONFIDENCE and ESTIMATE_HEAVY flags are warranted, not resolved: buy_mult and exit_mult lack transaction-level, size-comparable, owner-comp-normalized support. active_consolidators counts firms whose cited last deals were in 2023 plus an unnamed third platform, contrary to the last-24-month definition. The within-tolerance arithmetic deltas do not cure these research-input failures.

cross_checks_honest.note: The no-proxy and terminal-value discussions are candid, but uplift consistency says GRIT confirms 67-72% current adoption although the cited page only states 72% of buyers use GenAI in at least one project stage. Pricing deflation repeats an unsupported 70% revenue mix and presents it as established fact.

source_audits.note: The URL returned HTTP 403, so its acquisition list was inaccessible. The record itself says Savanta and STRAT7 last acquired in 2023 and supplies no cited identity or recent add-on for the estimated third platform, so it cannot support 3 active consolidators in the last 24 months.

The page gives directional 2025E public comps (about 7-8x for marketing agencies and 8.3x for market research/insights) and says SMB agencies are generally mid-single-digit. It does not establish a median 5.5x paid for $1-10M EBITDA 541910 boutiques, the asserted 4-7x range, or market-rate owner-comp normalization.

The vendor blog states that 72% of insights buyers use GenAI in at least one project stage, up from 23% in 2023. It does not contain the quoted 67% of suppliers embedding GenAI in client deliverables, and broad use by buyers is not the required share of US 541910 firms materially using AI.

The URL redirects to an accessible Equiteq ESG-consulting report landing page, but the accessible page does not show the claimed 11.9x 2024 private EV/EBITDA figure. It also does not support the unrelated asserted 7.2x 2025 PE business-services average or a 9.0x exit multiple for a 541910 platform.

The page discusses rapid AI-driven qualitative-research growth, but it does not say AI-moderated interviews surpassed human-moderated interviews across Insights Association member vendors in Q4 2025. It also does not establish the recorded 8-10 year online-panel or DIY-platform time-to-50% analog.

The McKinsey article states that more than half of US small-business owners are over 55 and one in four is 65 or older, exactly matching the quoted general benchmark. The industry-specific 60+ value remains explicitly marked ESTIMATE rather than being claimed as a directly reported 541910 statistic.

The article does report revenue-health scores of 98.2 for tech-forward suppliers and 34.0 for full-service research. It does not document AI-native entrants quoting dramatically lower prices or the recorded revenue billing mix of about 70% fixed-price, 20-25% tracker/retainer, and 5-10% qual/cost-plus.

reasons: At inputs.current_adoption_pct.url (https://getperspective.ai/blog/the-future-of-market-research-with-ai-2026-trends-that-will-reshape-the-industry), replace or correct the unsupported 67% supplier figure and provide a source measuring material AI adoption among US 541910 firms; then re-derive inputs.t50_years from that comparable population and definition.

At inputs.historical_analogs.url (https://getperspective.ai/blog/the-future-of-market-research-with-ai-2026-trends-that-will-reshape-the-industry), replace the absent claim that AI-moderated interviews surpassed human volume and provide findable evidence for each stated prior-technology time-to-50% analog.

At inputs.active_consolidators.url (https://tracxn.com/d/acquisitions/acquisitions-by-savanta/__pA2oW53Ozr-poD2sYH45fOlkXeWa9Exl_oGdTxoc12I), provide accessible deal evidence naming every counted PE-backed 541910 platform and a qualifying add-on within the required last 24 months; do not count stale 2023 activity or an unnamed platform.

At inputs.buy_mult.url (https://mergersandacquisitions.net/insights/advertising-marketing-services-mergers-and-acquisitions), replace the public/directional marketing-services proxy with evidence for actual small 541910 transaction EV/EBITDA, size comparability, and market-rate owner-comp normalization.

At inputs.exit_mult.url (https://www.equiteq.com/reports/download-esg-consulting-report-2025), provide an accessible page or report excerpt establishing the cited figure and a comparable $10M+ EBITDA 541910 platform basis; the current landing page does not expose 11.9x and ESG consulting is not itself a sufficient industry comparable.

At inputs.pricing_structure.url (https://www.greenbook.org/insights/artificial-intelligence-and-machine-learning/the-sea-change-insights-from-the-2025-grit-business-outlook), provide evidence for the 70%/20-25%/5-10% billing mix and the alleged lower-price bidding mechanism, then reassess inputs.pi_dist and the pricing-model cross-check from supported facts.
flags_reviewed: ESTIMATE_HEAVY: 3 inputs with quality ESTIMATE (buy_mult, exit_mult, owners_60plus_pct)
ARITH_DELTA_WITHIN_TOL: nonzero stored-vs-recomputed deltas on B, M, S, V
